description.description: A description for the permission scheme.

expand.description: The expand options available for the permission scheme.

id.description: The ID of the permission scheme.

name.description: The name of the permission scheme. Must be unique.

permissions.description: The permission scheme to create or update. See [About permission schemes and grants](../api-group-permission-schemes/#about-permission-schemes-and-grants) for more information.

scope.description: The scope of the permission scheme.

self.description: The URL of the permission scheme.
